mapper.sql: g.id, g.goods_name, g.type_id, g.buy_price, g.sell_price, g.stock_num, g.image_url, g.remark, g.min_stock, g.create_time, g.update_time
mapper.select: select , t.type_name from goods g left join goods_type t on g.type_id = t.id
mapper.insert: insert into goods ( goods_name, type_id, buy_price, sell_price, stock_num , image_url , remark , min_stock , create_time , update_time ) values ( #{goodsName}, #{typeId}, #{buyPrice}, #{sellPrice}, #{stockNum} , #{imageUrl} , #{remark} , #{minStock} , now() , now() )
mapper.update:
update goods
goods_name = #{goodsName}, type_id = #{typeId}, buy_price = #{buyPrice}, sell_price = #{sellPrice}, stock_num = #{stockNum}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, remark = #{remark},
min_stock = #{minStock},
update_time = now()
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from goods where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select , t.type_name from goods g left join goods_type t on g.type_id = t.id where g.id = #{id}
select , t.type_name from goods g left join goods_type t on g.type_id = t.id where g.stock_num < IFNULL(g.min_stock, 10)
